fix_applied.new_function: apollo_enrich_batch(people) — calls POST /v1/people/bulk_match with all person IDs after search, merges enriched data back into results
fix_applied.flow: 1. mixed_people/api_search returns IDs + first names only → 2. bulk_match enriches all IDs in one call → 3. full names, LinkedIn URLs, emails merged back

live_test_result.test_person: Jay Trotter, VP of Sales, Arborgold Software

notes: Email availability depends on Apollo credit balance and whether the person's email has been verified in Apollo's database
2,500 credits available — each bulk_match call consumes 1 credit per person enriched
At 10 prospects/day, this gives ~250 days of enrichment
Tomorrow's 9am cron will be the first live run with enrichment active
